description_long: This object is a classic-style revolver handgun featuring a dark metallic frame and barrel, complemented by a wooden grip. The revolver has a six-chambered cylinder, visible from the side, and a prominent trigger and trigger guard finished in a brass or gold tone. The grip is smoothly contoured and appears to be made of polished wood, providing a comfortable hold. The barrel is medium in length, with a simple, unadorned profile and a front sight post. No visible engravings or markings are present on the barrel or frame, and the overall design is utilitarian with a touch of vintage craftsmanship.
description: A vintage-style revolver with a dark metal frame, wooden grip, and brass-toned trigger and guard. The design is simple, robust, and functional.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full profile of the revolver, including the wooden grip, metallic frame, and brass trigger guard.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back of the grip and the alignment of the barrel and cylinder.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the other side of the grip, cylinder, and barrel, mirroring the details seen in view 0.
description_view_3: Front view focusing on the muzzle, front sight, and the rounded end of the barrel.
attribute_grip_design: The grip is made of polished wood with a smooth, gently curved contour that fits comfortably in the hand. It lacks any visible checkering or stippling, presenting a clean, classic appearance. The wood grain is subtly visible, and the grip is attached to the frame with visible fasteners. There are no finger grooves, logos, or decorative embellishments, emphasizing a traditional and utilitarian design.
attribute_trigger_guard_style: The trigger guard is rounded and moderately thick, finished in a brass or gold tone that contrasts with the dark frame. It has a smooth, continuous curve with no undercuts or squared-off edges, and no visible texturing or reinforcement. The design is simple and functional, providing ample space for finger access.
attribute_barrel_type: The barrel is of medium length with a straight, unadorned profile and a dark metallic finish. It does not feature threading, porting, or compensators, and there are no visible external markings or embellishments. The front sight post is present at the muzzle end.
attribute_slide_markings: There are no visible markings, engravings, or inscriptions on the frame, barrel, or cylinder. The surfaces appear plain and unmarked, with no manufacturer logos, model names, or decorative patterns.
attribute_magazine_base_shape: As a revolver, this handgun does not have a detachable magazine or floorplate. The base of the grip is flat and smoothly finished, with no extensions, flares, or finger rests, and no visible logos or texturing.
